new_claims.claim_text: Iran OFFICIALLY CLOSES the STRAIT OF HORMUZ until further notice due to Israel’s attack on Lebanon
new_claims.notes: Unverified claim from Fars News Agency, with major geopolitical and economic implications. Requires independent verification.

new_claims.claim_text: 3 Kuwaiti power stations & water distillation plants were struck by Iranian drones this morning, causing significant damage
new_claims.notes: Critical unverified claim of escalation. Requires independent verification.

new_claims.claim_text: Iran says it will withdraw from the US ceasefire agreement if Israel continues to violate it by attacking Lebanon
new_claims.notes: Significant statement of intent from an Iranian source (Tasnim news agency). Requires independent verification.
